examples: The origins, though not the cause of Ebola-Sudan, can be traced back to a single individual in a Sudanese town.
The Sudanese leader has left for a two-day visit to Zambia.
The Sudanese information minister Ahmed Belal Osman blamed the attack on Israeli air force.
The South Sudanese have earned their independence in a way that most nations never have.
The violence in Darfur erupted in 2003 after rebels began an uprising against the Sudanese government.
